title: Assigned work
subtitle: Your profile and operations within assigned scopes only.

overview.title: Overview
overview.summary: Manager readiness, profile, scope, and module status.

kpi.title: Managed KPI
kpi.summary: Published KPI plans visible through your effective assignments.
kpi.disabledReason: Managed KPI appears after an effective KPI manager assignment is available.

work.title: Managed Work
work.summary: Published official shifts for members in your assigned scopes.
work.disabledReason: Managed Work requires an effective assignment and WorkSchedule read capability.
work.readinessMessage: Managed Work is unavailable until an effective Org Unit or Talent Group assignment is available.

revenue.title: Daily Platform Source
revenue.summary: Submit daily platform source data for assigned Talent Groups.
revenue.disabledReason: Daily Platform Source requires an effective Talent Group assignment and source submission capability.
revenue.readinessMessage: Daily Platform Source is unavailable until Finance enables source submission for an assigned Talent Group.

events.title: Managed Events
events.summary: Read-only events within your assigned scopes.
events.disabledReason: Managed Events requires an active assignment and Event read capability.
events.readinessMessage: Managed Events is unavailable until an effective Org Unit or Talent Group assignment is available.

groups.title: Managed Groups
groups.summary: Assigned Org Unit and Talent Group context.
groups.readinessMessage: This module is not currently available for the current access. Assigned scope summaries remain in Overview.

members.title: Managed Members
members.readinessMessage: This module is not currently available for the current access.

overview.readinessSummary: Current manager context and assignment readiness.
overview.readyMessage: You can view work within the assigned scope.
overview.kpiSummary: Managed KPI visibility is driven by effective assignments.
overview.unsupportedSummary: These modules are not currently available for the current access.

kpi.title: My Managed KPI
kpi.summary: Published KPI plans visible through your effective manager assignments.
kpi.boundary: You only see data within assigned scopes. KPI shown here does not automatically create commission or payroll.

detail.subject: Subject
detail.noAllocations: No allocation rows are visible for this plan.
detail.readOnlyPosture: Your current manager assignment can read this KPI, but cannot perform Unit Manager KPI write actions.
detail.talentGroupReadOnlyTitle: Talent Group KPI is read-only here
detail.talentGroupReadOnlyMessage: Talent Group operations are not enabled for this access in this batch.

work.title: Managed Work
work.summary: Published official WorkShifts for active members in your exact managed Org Units and Talent Groups.
work.boundary: You only see data within assigned scopes. Official shifts are work plans, not attendance or payroll.
work.draftNotice: Draft rosters are not visible here until they are published.

actionNeeded.title: Action needed
actionNeeded.summary: Display-only operational cues from your existing request and availability batches.
actionNeeded.bounded: Counts show the loaded results for the selected month, not exact global totals.

events.title: Managed Events
events.boundaryHelper: This screen is read-only. Managers can only view events within their assigned scope and cannot confirm, cancel, complete, archive, or book resources from here.
events.noScopeMessage: No active Org Unit or Talent Group manager assignment is available for scoped event visibility.
events.loadErrorMessage: Events for your assigned scope could not be loaded.
events.notFoundMessage: This event is not visible through your assigned manager scope.
events.emptyMessage: No events are visible for your current manager assignments.
events.noCompletionEvidence: No completion evidence has been recorded.
events.completionBoundaryHelper: This evidence is read-only operational context and does not create revenue, commission, attendance, payroll, payment, or payout.
events.noBookings: No resource bookings are exposed for this event.

revenue.title: Daily platform source
revenue.boundaryHelper: Managers only submit source data within assigned scope. Finance reviews and creates official Revenue Entries. Manager submission is not revenue approval and does not create commission, payment, payroll, tax, or accounting.
revenue.noScopeMessage: No assigned Talent Group source submission scope is available.
revenue.loadErrorMessage: Assigned source submission scope could not be loaded.
revenue.noEligibleAccountMessage: No active monetized livestream platform account is configured for the selected Talent Group.

loadErrors.batch: Availability history could not be loaded.
loadErrors.detail: Availability details could not be loaded.

applyStatuses.NOT_APPLIED: Not applied to a draft roster

confirmation.title: Cancel pending availability?
confirmation.summary: This cancels only your pending planning submission and does not change an official shift.

copy.planning: Availability is a pre-roster planning signal for Admin/Ops.
copy.noAttendance: It is not attendance, payroll, paid leave, or unpaid leave evidence.
copy.noAutoApply: Approved lines are not auto-applied. Admin/Ops must apply them to a Draft Monthly Roster.
copy.otherAdvisory: Other availability notes are advisory only.
copy.independentOfShifts: Availability remains usable even when published shifts are empty or unavailable.

validation.maxLines: Add at least one managed member and keep the batch within 50 lines.
validation.lineRequired: Add at least one availability line.
validation.dateRequired: Start and end date are required.
validation.dateOrder: End date must be the same as or after start date.
validation.dateRepresentation: Use one date for a single-day availability line, or a start and end date for a range.
validation.submitFailed: Availability could not be submitted. Check the line details and try again.
validation.preferredTime: Preferred time lines need a valid start and end time.
validation.memberTargetMismatch: Every availability line must use a member from the selected exact target.

states.emptyBatches: No availability batches for this month.
states.emptyMembersMessage: No eligible managed members were returned for the selected exact target.
states.loadingMembers: Loading eligible members for the selected target...
states.memberLoadError: Eligible members could not be loaded. Availability submission is blocked.
states.batchLoadError: Availability history could not be loaded.
states.detailLoadError: Availability details could not be loaded.

confirmation.title: Cancel pending schedule request?
confirmation.summary: This cancels only your pending request and does not directly change an official shift.

states.listError: Request history could not be loaded.
states.detailError: Request details could not be loaded.

copy.approval: Requests do not change official shifts until Admin/Ops approval.
copy.draftRoster: Draft roster rows are not requestable.
copy.cancellation: Use request cancellation only for pending requests.
copy.taxonomy: Leave/absence policy is not classified in this step. This is schedule change request, not attendance.

validation.noLines: Add at least one request line.
validation.maxLines: A batch can contain at most 50 lines.
validation.reason: Each line reason must be 10-1000 characters.
validation.shiftRequired: Choose an active official WorkShift for reschedule or cancel.
validation.windowRequired: Create and reschedule lines require start and end.
validation.windowOrder: Requested end must be after requested start.
validation.lineMonth: Requested line dates must be inside the selected request month.
validation.periodWindow: Choose the current month or one of the next two months.
validation.duplicate: Remove duplicate request lines before submitting.
validation.cancelReason: Enter a cancellation reason of at least 10 characters.

feedback.submitFailed: Request batch could not be submitted.

empty.noMembersMessage: The request composer needs manager-safe member data from published active shifts.
empty.noBatchesMessage: Submitted request batches for this month will appear here.

empty.noProfileMessage: Your account is authenticated, but no manager-ready Employment Profile is linked.
empty.noAssignmentsMessage: No active Org Unit or Talent Group manager assignments are effective for your profile.
empty.kpiMessage: Unit KPI and Talent Group KPI are hidden until an effective assignment is available.
empty.kpiListMessage: No published KPI plans are visible for this managed scope yet.
empty.kpiDetailUnavailableMessage: This KPI plan is not visible through your current manager assignments.
empty.workReadinessMessage: No effective managed WorkSchedule scope is available.
empty.workMessage: No active published official shifts are visible for the selected month. Draft rosters are not visible until published.
empty.workNoMembersMessage: Your assignments currently contain no eligible active managed members.

errors.contextMessage: Your assigned work access could not be loaded.
errors.kpiMessage: Managed KPI plans could not be loaded.
errors.kpiDeniedMessage: Your current manager assignment does not have access to these KPI plans.
errors.kpiDetailMessage: The selected KPI plan could not be loaded.
errors.workMessage: Managed published shifts could not be loaded.
